name: Hangman
author: Poki
description: Hangman is the digital version of your favorite letter guessing game. Concentrate, get ready to think on your feet and enjoy this timeless classic! How to play: Try to guess the word or the phrase by choosing one letter at a time. About the creator: Hangman was created by MarketJS. They are known for games like Ludo Hero and Math Trivia Live, both playable here on Poki!
